field_values.action_summary: Sola returns to provide nourishment (cheese-like substance and plant milk) and warmth, covering the protagonist with furs as the Martian night turns cold.
field_values.camera_intent: Medium shots of sola interacting with protagonist; Close-ups of food and drink; Soft low-key lighting for night sequence
field_values.end_state: scene resolves into the next narrative beat
movement_notes: Food and plant milk levels in containers
Volume and placement of furs used to cover protagonist
Lighting transition from dusk to cold Martian night
field_values.transition_notes:
# Scene Contract: CH005_SC002

## Production Intent
Establish sola as a sympathetic caregiver through the provision of physical sustenance and warmth to the naked protagonist. The sequence must transition from the tension of captivity to a state of vulnerable comfort as the Martian night descends.

## Required Cast
- protagonist (naked, experienced Earthman fighter)
- sola (sympathetic figure)

## Required Environments
- captive_chamber_murals (decorated with Martian landscape murals)

## Continuity Constraints
- Food and plant milk levels in containers
- Volume and placement of furs used to cover protagonist
- Lighting transition from dusk to cold Martian night

## Beat List
- BT001: Sola enters with nourishment
- BT002: Provision of food and drink
- BT003: Provision of warmth and nightfall
field_values.dialogue_relevance: dialogue supports scene intent and continuity
